_comment: Pinned upstream sources this repository's content was checked against. Update alongside verification/toolchains/current.json when re-verifying. Hand-maintained; tooling/check_versions.ts checks internal consistency.

sources.notes: Docs site banner version. Known lag: trait/impl pages still show the pre-v0.10.0 fn-less syntax that the v0.10.0 release notes superseded.
Numbered releases start at 0.8.0 (2026-02-09); monthly updates Vol.01-07 before that.
Official skills bundle (9 skills incl. moonbit-agent-guide, moonbit-orientation). Audited for the incremental-value statement in README.
Upstream of the skills bundle's moonbit-agent-guide skill; 58 KB monolithic SKILL.md, CI-tested via literate SKILL.mbt.md on nightly+latest channels.
Proposal statuses lag shipped reality (e.g. 0001 try-catch/noraise marked 'Under review' but shipped 2025-07). Never treat a proposal here as a current capability without toolchain verification.

Frontmatter constraints: name <=64 chars lowercase/digits/hyphens matching directory name, no consecutive hyphens; description 1-1024 chars; version lives under metadata; validator: pip install skills-ref, CLI `agentskills validate`.
